hero.label: Premium Ceramic Tableware
hero.subheadline: High-fired ceramic tableware made in Thailand for hospitality and retail.

brandIntro.label: Who We Are
brandIntro.heading: Where Tradition Meets the Modern Table
brandIntro.p1: Cego Ceramics was born from a deep reverence for Thai artisanal craft. Every piece that leaves our kilns carries the weight of tradition — formed by skilled hands, fired with precision, and glazed with character.
brandIntro.p2: From intimate bistros to five-star dining rooms, our tableware elevates every meal into an experience. We believe the vessel is as important as what it holds.

meta.title: Collections | Cego Ceramics
meta.description: Explore 8 handcrafted ceramic tableware collections from Cego Ceramics — from rustic matte to pearl-glaze luxury.

hero.label: Our Collections
hero.heading: Eight Collections. One Craft.
hero.subheading: From rustic matte stoneware to luminous pearl glaze — every collection tells a different story at the table.

stories.blue-white: Our Blue & White collection draws from centuries of cobalt glazing tradition. Each piece is hand-painted with classic patterns — flowing motifs, geometric borders, and floral accents — capturing the timeless beauty that has graced fine dining tables for generations.
stories.matt-brown: The Matt Brown collection celebrates the raw beauty of the earth. Deep, earthy tones and a matte finish give each piece a natural warmth that pairs equally well with rustic bistro settings and contemporary fine dining.
stories.dusty-iron: Inspired by ancient iron-glazing techniques, the Dusty Iron collection features a smoky, textured surface with rich depth. The reactive glaze creates natural variation — no two pieces are identical.
stories.two-tone: The Two-Tone collection explores the tension and harmony of contrasting glazes. Each piece is dipped twice — creating a distinctive boundary where two worlds of colour meet in a single, purposeful line.
stories.brush: In our Brush collection, the mark of the artist's hand is the point. Freehand painted with bold, spontaneous strokes, each piece celebrates the beauty of imperfection — a philosophy deeply rooted in Thai craft tradition.
stories.bpgp: BP & GP (Bold Pearl and Gold Pearl) is our luxury statement line. Lustrous pearl and gold-accent glazes bring a sense of occasion to every course — the collection of choice for five-star hotels and prestige dining.
stories.half-white: Half White is a study in minimalism. A clean bisque tone above, a soft coloured glaze below — the half-and-half dip creates effortless elegance through restraint. Versatile enough for any cuisine, sophisticated enough for any setting.
stories.white-pearl: White Pearl is pure luminosity. An opalescent glaze that catches and reflects light across its surface — making every dish presented on it feel elevated. The timeless choice for restaurants where simplicity is the luxury.

meta.title: Custom & OEM | Cego Ceramics
meta.description: Bespoke ceramic tableware for restaurants, hotels, and retail brands. Custom shapes, glazes, engravings, and OEM production from Thailand.

hero.label: Custom & OEM
hero.heading: Made to Your Vision
hero.subheading: From bespoke shapes to branded engravings — we bring your idea to life at production scale.

shapes.title: Custom Shapes
shapes.desc: Work with our design team to develop exclusive silhouettes — from plates and bowls to specialty vessels tailored to your menu and brand identity.

glazes.title: Bespoke Glazes
glazes.desc: Match your brand colours or create a signature finish. Our glaze chemists develop exclusive colour recipes that remain consistent across production runs.

branding.title: Brand Engraving
branding.desc: Emboss or engrave your logo directly into the clay body or stamp your mark into the glaze. Subtle brand presence on every piece.

packaging.title: Custom Packaging
packaging.desc: Branded gift boxes, retail sets, and export-ready packaging designed to your specifications — ideal for retail launches and corporate gifting.

steps.title: Consultation
steps.desc: Share your vision, quantity requirements, and timeline. We assess feasibility and provide a technical brief.

steps.title: Sampling
steps.desc: Our artisans produce hand-made samples for your review. We iterate until every detail is right — shape, glaze, weight, finish.

steps.title: Production
steps.desc: Once samples are approved, full production begins. Quality checks at every stage: forming, firing, glazing, and final inspection.

steps.title: Delivery
steps.desc: Securely packed and export-ready. We handle documentation for international shipping. Delivered on time, in perfect condition.

export.label: Export & Logistics
export.heading: Export Ready
export.desc: All custom orders are packed to international export standards — individual foam-cell wrapping, custom cartons, and full compliance documentation. We have established logistics partnerships across Asia, Europe, and beyond.
export.leadTime: Lead Time: 6–10 weeks (sample approval to delivery)

cta.heading: Ready to Start Your Custom Order?
cta.subheading: Get in touch with our sales team and we'll guide you through every step.

meta.title: About | Cego Ceramics
meta.description: The story behind Cego Ceramics — a Thai ceramic tableware manufacturer built on craft, precision, and professional-grade quality.

hero.label: About Cego
hero.heading: Born from Thai Craft
hero.subheading: A ceramic manufacturer that never forgot where it came from.

story.label: Our Story
story.heading: Where Tradition Meets the Modern Table
story.p1: Cego Ceramics was founded by craftspeople who grew up watching Thai potters shape clay by hand, fire kilns through the night, and glaze with a care that machines can't replicate. That origin never left us.
story.p2: We built a manufacturing operation that marries that artisanal heritage with the precision, consistency, and scale that modern hospitality demands. The result: ceramic tableware that looks handmade, performs professionally, and lasts.
story.p3: Today, Cego supplies restaurants, hotels, and retail brands across Asia and beyond — but every piece still starts with the same skilled hands and slow-fired kilns that defined us from the beginning.

manufacturing.label: Made in Thailand
manufacturing.heading: Precision Meets Artisanship
manufacturing.desc: Our facility in Thailand combines traditional hand-forming and glazing techniques with modern kiln technology. Every batch is quality-checked against international food-safety and durability standards before it leaves our doors.

foodSafe.title: Food-Safe Certified
foodSafe.desc: Lead-free and cadmium-free glazes, certified to international food-contact safety standards.

experience.title: 20+ Years Experience
experience.desc: Two decades of ceramic manufacturing experience serving the hospitality and retail industries.

exportReady.title: Export Ready
exportReady.desc: Shipped to distributors and buyers in Japan, Singapore, UAE, Germany, Australia, and the USA.

oemCapable.title: OEM Capable
oemCapable.desc: Full design-to-production custom capability — shapes, glazes, engravings, and branded packaging.
